title: WebLogic Cluster Configuration
description: Configuration schema for an Oracle WebLogic Server cluster including messaging mode, load balancing algorithm, and multicast settings.

name.description: Unique name of the cluster within the domain

clusterMessagingMode.description: Messaging mode used for cluster communication

clusterBroadcastChannel.description: Multicast channel name for cluster communication (used with multicast mode)

multicastAddress.description: Multicast address for cluster heartbeat messages

multicastPort.description: Multicast port for cluster heartbeat messages

clusterAddress.description: Comma-separated list of host:port pairs for all servers in the cluster

defaultLoadAlgorithm.description: Load balancing algorithm for routing requests to cluster members

weblogicPluginEnabled.description: Whether the WebLogic plugin is enabled for this cluster

frontendHost.description: Frontend hostname for the cluster (used in URL generation behind a load balancer)

httpPingRetryCount.description: Number of HTTP ping retries before marking a server as failed

httpPingPeriod.description: Period in seconds between HTTP health pings

dataSourceForAutomaticMigration.description: Data source used for database-based automatic migration leasing

replicationChannel.description: Network channel used for session replication

sessionFlushInterval.description: Interval in seconds for flushing session data to the replication channel

numberOfServersInClusterAddress.description: Number of servers to include in the generated cluster address
